---
title: 'Invited Paper: Dataflow Accelerator Architecture for Autonomous Machine Computing'
author:
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
- Bo Yu
- Jean-Luc Gaudiot
- Guang R. Gao
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3676536.3697112
journ: ICCAD
year: 2024
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 84
---
